mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report (reporterID, accusedActivityID, accusedUserID, reportReason, reportTime, reportProcessStatus, punishmentType, punishmentEndTime) VALUES (#{reporterID}, #{accusedActivityID}, #{accusedUserID}, #{reportReason}, #{reportTime}, #{reportProcessStatus}, #{punishmentType}, #{punishmentEndTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM report WHERE reporterID = #{reporterID} ORDER BY reportTime DESC, reportID DESC

SELECT r.* FROM report r WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( CAST(r.reportID AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(r.reporterID AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(r.accusedActivityID AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(r.accusedUserID AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.reportReason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user u WHERE (u.userID = r.reporterID OR u.userID = r.accusedUserID) AND (u.PhoneNumber LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.userMailbox LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.userName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ) )
AND r.reportProcessStatus = #{reportProcessStatus}
ORDER BY r.reportTime DESC, r.reportID DESC

SELECT r.*, ga.activityName AS accusedActivityName FROM report r LEFT JOIN groupactivity ga ON ga.activityID = r.accusedActivityID WHERE r.accusedUserID = #{accusedUserID} AND r.reportProcessStatus = '已通过' AND r.punishmentType = '警告' ORDER BY r.reportTime DESC, r.reportID DESC

SELECT r.*, ga.activityName AS accusedActivityName FROM report r LEFT JOIN groupactivity ga ON ga.activityID = r.accusedActivityID WHERE r.accusedUserID = #{accusedUserID} AND r.reportProcessStatus = '已通过' AND r.punishmentType LIKE '封号%' AND r.punishmentEndTime IS NOT NULL AND r.punishmentEndTime > NOW() ORDER BY r.punishmentEndTime DESC, r.reportID DESC LIMIT 1
